title: User Added to Administrative Group
description: Detects a user being added to the local/domain Administrators group (4732/4728), a privilege-escalation indicator.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-014: User Added to Administrative Group

aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4732%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4728%') AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%Administrators%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%S-1-5-32-544%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
